rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §38.052 governs school-based health center service contracts and has no relation to homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal.
quote: A district may contract with a person to provide services at a school-based health center.
_note: No conflict; cited rule is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
